products.name: Modules
products.descriptor: Pre-built long-range wireless video/data transmitter and receiver modules for drone integration

evidence.snippet:
### **Modules**
##### Pre-built modules for putting long-range video and data transmitter and receiver in your drone or robotics platform.
More Information
[](/modules)

products.name: Custom Solutions
products.descriptor: Custom PCBA and software development for long-range video/data transmission to customer specifications

evidence.snippet:
Our teams work together in a series of 1-3 meetings to lock in all customer requirements, scope customization work, agree on production costs and generate a memorandum of understanding.
4
#### Stage 4 - Customization
Upon contract signing, our team customizes PCBA and software to requirements for delivery within established timelines.

unresolved_questions: The /modules page (https://www.taisync.com/modules) was skipped_class_budget; it is the main product listing page and likely contains specific module SKU names, part numbers, and specs. Without it, only a coarse category-level entry is possible.
